name: com.neuronsearchlab/mcp
description: Recommendations, search, catalogue, analytics, and platform admin tools for NeuronSearchLab

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <NSL API key>. Optional — the endpoint also supports OAuth sign-in via discovery.

environmentVariables.name: NSL_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client ID for public mode (SDK Credentials from console → Security).

environmentVariables.name: NSL_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret for public mode.

environmentVariables.name: NSL_PLATFORM_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'internal' for admin-platform tools with an API key; defaults to 'public'.

environmentVariables.name: NSL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: NSL API key (nsl_...) for internal mode.
